allow: PowerShell($exp = Get-ChildItem "f:\\SocietySimulation\\experiments" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-Content "$exp\\state.json")

PowerShell($exp = Get-ChildItem "f:\\SocietySimulation\\experiments" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; $state = Get-Content "$exp\\state.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $state.status = "failed"; $state.phase = "audit"; $state.audit.completedArticles = @\("crime_0"\); $state.audit.currentArticle = "technology_0"; $state.error = @{ phase="audit"; articleId="technology_0"; message="Simulated rate limit"; timestamp="2026-05-20T18:00:00.000Z" }; $state | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content "$exp\\state.json"; Write-Host "Patched state.json to simulate mid-audit failure")

PowerShell($f = Get-ChildItem "f:\\SocietySimulation\\ab_tests" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-Content $f | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty variants | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Variant $\($_.variantIndex\)"; $_.effectSizes | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 })

PowerShell($exp = Get-ChildItem "f:\\SocietySimulation\\experiments" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-Content "$exp\\human_eval_template.csv" | Select-Object -First 5)
